# Newcastle Pet Cremation Services

> Compassionate pet cremation services for Newcastle upon Tyne, Gateshead, North Tyneside, South Tyneside, and Northumberland.

## About This Site
We provide dignified, individual pet cremation for dogs, cats, and small pets across the North East. This site helps families understand their options — from individual vs communal cremation, to memorial products, to what to expect during the process.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/) — Dignified pet cremation in Newcastle
- [Services](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/services.html) — Individual & communal cremation explained
- [Pricing](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/pricing.html) — Cost guide, no obligation quote
- [Memorials](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/memorials.html) — Urns, keepsakes & memorial products
- [The Process](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/process.html) — What to expect, step by step
- [FAQ](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/faq.html) — Common questions answered
- [Grief Support](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/grief-support.html) — Coping with loss
- [About](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/about.html) — Our story and commitment
- [Contact](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/contact.html) — Arrange a dignified farewell

## Areas We Serve
- [Newcastle upon Tyne](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/areas/newcastle.html)
- [Gateshead](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/areas/gateshead.html)
- [North Tyneside](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/areas/north-tyneside.html)
- [South Tyneside](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/areas/south-tyneside.html)
- [Northumberland](https://www.petcremationnewcastle.co.uk/pages/areas/northumberland.html)
